overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on an exterior escalator through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night. The camera ascends from an enclosed interior shaft, revealing a sprawling neon-lit cityscape with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, before arriving at an NCART transit station. The footage is clearly from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity rendering and atmospheric lighting.

agents.ego_description: ascending an escalator through a dark enclosed shaft with horizontal blinds visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a dark, enclosed escalator shaft with horizontal blinds visible ahead. The camera ascends steadily through the narrow interior space with glass railings on the left and dark walls on the right, approaching the light at the end of the shaft.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior elevated transitway with panoramic city views

events.description: exits enclosed shaft to open exterior revealing sprawling night cityscape
transition from dim artificial interior to bright neon city illumination

agents.ego_description: ascending the exterior escalator while overlooking the neon-lit metropolis below

entered.detail: sprawling futuristic cityscape with numerous illuminated skyscrapers and towers
tall buildings with glowing windows and neon signage
elevated highway with moving vehicle lights visible below

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the enclosed shaft, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera continues ascending on the exterior escalator, revealing neon-lit skyscrapers, distant towers, and highways with sparse traffic below, all under a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway passing adjacent to neon-lit skyscrapers

events.description: moving closer to adjacent buildings with prominent vertical yellow advertisement banners

agents.ego_description: continuing to ascend past close-proximity skyscrapers with bright neon facades

entered.detail: tall building with large vertical yellow illuminated advertisement banners
building facade with prominent horizontal purple and pink neon strips
large illuminated circular structure visible in the distant cityscape

segments.scene_description: The escalator continues ascending alongside towering skyscrapers adorned with bright yellow vertical banners and vibrant purple neon lighting. The camera passes close to these illuminated building facades while the broader city skyline shifts to the right, maintaining a steady upward trajectory through the dense urban environment.

events.description: enters dark interior tunnel transitioning from exterior city view to station
station interior becomes visible with illuminated NCART signage and transit map displays

agents.ego_description: arriving at the NCART station platform and preparing to exit the escalator

entered.detail: bright cyan and yellow illuminated sign reading 'NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit'
illuminated digital transit map showing route information
concrete platform area of the rapid transit station

segments.scene_description: The escalator enters a dark interior tunnel, transitioning from the open city view to the enclosed station environment. As the camera approaches the platform, the NCART station signage becomes visible with bright cyan neon lettering, transit map displays, and the station platform, marking the end of the ascent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a dark, enclosed shaft into a sprawling neon metropolis before concluding inside a futuristic transit station. It begins by climbing through a narrow interior space with glass railings and horizontal blinds, moving steadily toward a distant light. As the camera emerges from the shaft, the scene opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of a cyberpunk city at night, revealing towering skyscrapers and highways under a clear sky. The trajectory then carries the camera alongside building facades adorned with vibrant purple neon and bright yellow banners, shifting the skyline to the right as the ascent continues. Finally, the open city view vanishes as the escalator enters a dark interior tunnel, transitioning toward the bright cyan signage and platforms of the NCART station.
